vocab.meaning: một dấu hiệu của sự sành điệu/tinh tế
vocab.example: I believe wearing a classic watch is a mark of sophistication that a smartphone simply cannot replicate.

vocab.meaning: độ chính xác về mặt đo lường thời gian
vocab.example: While I appreciate the chronometric accuracy of digital devices, I still find myself drawn to the soul of a ticking clock.

vocab.meaning: sự khéo léo/tinh tế trong cách ăn mặc
vocab.example: For me, choosing the right watch strap is all about sartorial finesse and matching the occasion.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác thông qua xúc giác (cảm giác chạm)
vocab.example: I prefer mechanical watches because they offer a tactile interaction, like winding the crown every morning.

vocab.meaning: một điểm tựa về thời gian (giúp giữ nhịp độ)
vocab.example: My wristwatch acts as an anchor in time, keeping me grounded and focused throughout a chaotic workday.

vocab.meaning: sự sang trọng kín đáo (không phô trương)
vocab.example: I tend to go for timepieces that exude understated luxury rather than those encrusted with jewels.

vocab.meaning: để lại/truyền lại (tài sản, đồ vật)
vocab.example: I wear this watch because it was bequeathed to me by my grandfather, making it far more than just a tool.

vocab.meaning: một sự trân trọng/gợi nhớ về truyền thống
vocab.example: In an era of smart technology, wearing an analog watch is a small but meaningful nod to tradition.

vocab.meaning: kiểu dáng linh hoạt (dễ phối với nhiều loại đồ)
vocab.example: I love this particular model because its versatile silhouette works just as well with a suit as it does with jeans.
Checking my wrist allows me to bypass the temptation of looking at my phone and getting sucked into social media.
